playbooks.name: agent-orchestration
playbooks.description: "Agent orchestration SOP — multi-agent dispatch, task delegation, workflow coordination, and agent routing. Routes to Slack, Base44, and Neptune connectors."

playbooks.name: billing
playbooks.description: "Billing operations SOP — refunds, declines, charges, payment recovery, and NMI vault management. Routes to NMI, Hyperswitch, Forth, and Base44 connectors."

playbooks.name: deploy
playbooks.description: Ship features, create PRs, rollback, and diagnose stale UI

playbooks.name: disputes
playbooks.description: "Credit disputes SOP — debt validation, FCRA compliance, credit report parsing, and dispute orchestration. Routes to Forth, Base44, and Slack connectors."

playbooks.name: engineering
playbooks.description: "Engineering SOP — code reviews, PR management, deployment pipeline, architecture decisions, and sandbox coding. Routes to GitHub, Vercel, Linear, MCP Hub, and Neptune connectors."

playbooks.name: hr
playbooks.description: "HR ops SOP — team management, employee onboarding/offboarding, compliance tracking. Routes to Slack and Base44 connectors."

playbooks.name: index
playbooks.description: Full domain catalog and capability discovery — the master index of all playbooks

playbooks.name: marketing
playbooks.description: "Marketing ops SOP — campaign orchestration, lead nurture sequences, email/SMS blasts via GHL, and content strategy. Routes to GHL, Affy, and Slack connectors."

playbooks.name: newleaf
playbooks.description: Organization-wide rules, cardinal constraints, and compliance standards

playbooks.name: other
playbooks.description: Catches orphan connectors and capabilities that don't fit a specific business domain

playbooks.name: reporting
playbooks.description: "Reporting SOP — operational dashboards, morning pulse, analytics queries, and data snapshots. Routes to Base44 (reportingHubQuery), Slack, and Wiki connectors."

playbooks.name: sales
playbooks.description: Pipeline management, lead qualification, enrollment funnel metrics

playbooks.name: vercel-discipline
playbooks.description: "Vercel deployment SOP — deploy standards, security patterns, preview environments, and production shipping. Routes to Vercel, GitHub, and Slack connectors."

playbooks.name: video-generation
playbooks.description: AI video generation, editing, and script-to-video conversion

playbooks.name: vps-ops
playbooks.description: "VPS ops SOP — server management, pm2 process control, nginx config, Cloudflare DNS, and system health monitoring. Routes to Slack and Wiki connectors."

skills.name: playbook-skills
skills.description: Meta-skill that loads playbook SOPs and functions

workflows.name: billing-sweep
workflows.description: Pull failed NMI transactions, run smart retry engine, report results to Slack

workflows.name: customer-360
workflows.description: Full customer analysis — profile, payments, communications, credit reports, AI summary

workflows.name: dispute-pipeline
workflows.description: Process new credit dispute rounds — pull credit reports, AI classify items, update Base44, report results

workflows.name: morning-pulse
workflows.description: "Daily system health check — queries Base44 reports, summarizes with AI, posts to Slack

workflows.name: new-hire-onboarding
workflows.description: Onboard a new team member — create CRM contact, send welcome SMS, notify Slack, create Linear task

tools.name: getV2SessionTool
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific neptune-v2 coding session, including status, progress, and any output.

tools.name: getWeather
tools.description: Get the current weather at a location. You can provide either coordinates or a city name.

tools.name: listV2SessionsTool
tools.description: List all active coding sessions on neptune-v2. Returns session IDs, statuses, and prompts.

tools.name: loadPlaybook
tools.description: Load a domain playbook to discover SOPs and routines for a specific business domain.

tools.name: loadSkill
tools.description: Load detailed skill content on-demand from the knowledge base.

tools.name: planSession
tools.description: Enter formal PLANNING MODE. When the user wants to plan a feature, bug fix,

tools.name: queryKnowledge
tools.description: Query the Knowledge Graph to find what connectors, playbooks, skills, functions, workflows and their relationships actually exist in this system. CRITICAL: ALWAYS use this when describing system capab

tools.name: selfCode
tools.description: Make a SMALL change to Neptune Chat

tools.name: spawnCodingAgent
tools.description: Hand off a complex multi-step coding task to Neptune V2 long-running agent.

tools.name: streamV2ProgressTool
tools.description: Get the SSE stream URL for a neptune-v2 coding session to track live progress.

tools.name: swarmDispatchTool
tools.description: Dispatch a swarm of 2-8 parallel AI agents to research, code, audit, or catalog.

tools.name: viewFile
tools.description: View the contents of a file in the repository. Supports relative or absolute paths with optional line slicing.
